text: when aims are too small (less than say 20 pixel radius), don't display the text
description: For the check whether the lable get's shown we have to consider radius, half page size and zoom. Individually per aim!

status.comment: Corrected visual radius calculation in GraphNode.vue to use the computed `visualScale`. Now strictly hides labels if visual radius is < 20px. Also removed static visibility threshold for links in GraphLink.vue per user feedback.
